candidate_definition_hints.text: Recipes and resources for building, deploying, and fine-tuning generative AI with Fireworks.
Ready-to-run training recipes for reinforcement learning (GRPO, DAPO, GSPO, CISPO), preference optimization (DPO, ORPO), and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on [Fireworks](https://fireworks.ai).

candidate_glosses.text: Ready-to-run training recipes for reinforcement learning (GRPO, DAPO, GSPO, CISPO), preference optimization (DPO, ORPO), and supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on [Fireworks](https://fireworks.ai).
